register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Start your campaign
register.success: Account created. Check your email to confirm.

landing.hero_description: Not the main storyline. The side projects, the optional habits, the goals that get postponed forever. Calibrate their rarity, complete them, unlock achievements.
landing.pillar1_body: Each mission carries its own symbolic weight. The interface reflects it without shouting.
landing.pillar2_body: Weeklies don't reset — they accumulate. Consistency becomes a trophy.
landing.pillar3_body: 20 catalog milestones appear unannounced. And every completed mission leaves its own.

setup.title: Set up your profile
setup.subtitle: Choose how you want to be known

onboarding.step0_title: This is not a to-do list.
onboarding.step0_body: The things you want to do but are never urgent — side projects, optional habits, goals that keep getting postponed. Here they live as side quests.
onboarding.step1_body: You decide how important each mission is. "Call the dentist" is common. "Learn another language" is legendary. That gesture forces you to think about magnitude.
onboarding.step2_body: Unique missions have a deadline. Weeklies are habits: every time you complete them, you add up. They don't fail, they just accumulate.
onboarding.step3_body: Every completed mission leaves a trophy. Plus 20 hidden catalog achievements, waiting to be unlocked without you knowing.

errors.email_invalid: The email address is not valid
errors.email_not_confirmed: Check your email to confirm your account before signing in
errors.rate_limit: Too many attempts. Wait a few minutes.
